source_queue.policy_title: Appoint Thurgood Marshall to the Supreme Court
source_queue.outcome_summary: Johnson delivered the appointment by nominating and securing confirmation of Thurgood Marshall to the Supreme Court.
source_queue.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

source_queue.policy_title: Expand affirmative-action requirements in federal contracting
source_queue.outcome_summary: Nixon administration policy expanded affirmative-action enforcement in federal contracting through the Philadelphia Plan framework.
source_queue.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

source_queue.policy_title: Sign the Civil Rights Act of 1875
source_queue.outcome_summary: Grant signed a federal public-accommodations and equal-treatment law, representing a major Reconstruction-era civil-rights protection, though later Supreme Court decisions limited its long-term enforcement.
source_queue.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

source_queue.policy_title: Sign the Civil Rights Act of 1964
source_queue.outcome_summary: Johnson delivered the central anti-discrimination law of the Civil Rights era through enactment of the Civil Rights Act of 1964.
source_queue.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

source_queue.policy_title: Issue Executive Order 11246 on nondiscrimination and affirmative action in federal contracting
source_queue.outcome_summary: Johnson created a stronger executive framework for nondiscrimination and affirmative-action enforcement in federal contracting before later Nixon-era expansion.
source_queue.curation_hint: Derived source-curation priority score 100: impact_direction=Positive, evidence_strength=Strong, status=Complete, measurable_impact=present, black_community_impact_note=present.

intent_queue.title: Social Security Amendments of 1965
intent_queue.outcome_summary: Greatly expanded health insurance access and became central to reducing racial gaps in medical coverage and care, especially through Medicaid and later expansions tied to it.
intent_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

intent_queue.title: Enforcement Act of 1871 (Second Enforcement Act)
intent_queue.outcome_summary: Allowed federal supervision of elections in areas with suppression.
intent_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

intent_queue.title: Post-9/11 GI Bill
intent_queue.outcome_summary: Expanded educational and wealth-building opportunities for a new generation of veterans, including many Black veterans, though differences in school quality, debt, labor markets, and family wealth still shaped how fully those benefits translated into long-run gains.
intent_queue.categories: Business and Economics, Education, Military and Veterans
intent_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

intent_queue.title: Honoring our PACT Act of 2022
intent_queue.outcome_summary: Broadened access to treatment and compensation for veterans with service-connected toxic exposure conditions, which matters for Black veterans as part of a larger struggle over equal recognition, care, and support after service.
intent_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

intent_queue.title: Healthy Start Initiative
intent_queue.outcome_summary: Targeted maternal and infant health resources toward high-risk communities, which has mattered disproportionately for Black mothers and infants because of persistent racial gaps in mortality, prenatal care, and postpartum support.
intent_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.
